design_philosophy: A command-center utility that feels like an advanced technical terminal, not a standard SaaS site. Prioritizes raw function and clear hierarchy, utilizing monospaced elements for technical data and bold sans-serif for headers.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none uppercase font-black

surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Solid surface background `#111111` with `border border-[#222222]`. No rounded corners. Focus on stark lines.
surface_strategies.buttons: Flat solid background, sharp edges, brutalist solid shadow.
surface_strategies.header: Solid black with hard bottom border. `border-b border-[#222222]`.

motion_and_interactions.hover: For primary buttons: translate-x-[2px] translate-y-[2px] shadow-none (simulating a physical press).
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use a kinetic marquee for the disclaimer, highly visible to prevent Adobe affiliation issues.

upload_zone.style: Massive target area. Dashed border `border-2 border-dashed border-[#333333] hover:border-yellow-500`. Background: `bg-[#0A0A0A]`. Must include an icon and clear CTA.

dropdown.style: Use customized Shadcn UI Select. Apply `rounded-none`, `bg-[#111]`, `border-[#333]`, and use monospace font for the options.

results_panel.style: Terminal-like window. `bg-black`, `border border-[#333]`, `font-mono`, `text-sm`, with syntax highlighting colors for warnings (yellow) and removals (red).

marquee_disclaimer.style: Text: 'NOT AFFILIATED WITH ADOBE INC. • UNOFFICIAL COMPATIBILITY OPTIMIZER • USE AT OWN RISK'. Yellow background `bg-yellow-500`, black text `text-black`, uppercase, monospace.

images.description: Dark abstract texture for background overlay
images.usage: Apply as a fixed background overlay covering the viewport, using `opacity-5` and `mix-blend-lighten` or `mix-blend-overlay` to add subtle texture to the black background, preventing flat digital look.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against black meets minimum 4.5:1. Use text-slate-100 for primary text, text-slate-400 for secondary.
accessibility.test_ids: Apply `data-testid` to upload-zone, target-version-dropdown, convert-button, download-button, results-panel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `react-fast-marquee` and use it for the global disclaimer banner at the very top or bottom of the layout.
Ensure Shadcn UI components (Select, Button, Card, Toast) are customized with `rounded-none` to fit the brutalist archetype.
The layout should be asymmetric: Use a CSS grid where the upload area is the dominant hero (e.g., col-span-8), and the configuration/results panel sits beside or below it.
Import 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Mono' from Google Fonts in the HTML or global CSS.
Remember to clearly state in the UI that this is NOT an official Adobe product.
